inputs.label: Initial Investment
inputs.businessContext: Total upfront capital expenditure required to start the project.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total upfront capital expenditure required to start the project.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Projeyi başlatmak için gereken toplam başlangıç sermaye harcaması.

inputs.label: Annual Cash Inflows
inputs.businessContext: Expected yearly benefits or revenue generated by the project.

businessContext_i18n.en: Expected yearly benefits or revenue generated by the project.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Proje tarafından üretilmesi beklenen yıllık faydalar veya gelir.

inputs.label: Annual Operating Costs
inputs.businessContext: Recurring costs for operation, maintenance, labor, and materials.

businessContext_i18n.en: Recurring costs for operation, maintenance, labor, and materials.
businessContext_i18n.tr: İşletme, bakım, işçilik ve malzemeler için yinelenen maliyetler.

inputs.label: Project Life
inputs.businessContext: Anticipated useful lifespan of the investment.

businessContext_i18n.en: Anticipated useful lifespan of the investment.

inputs.label: Discount Rate
inputs.businessContext: Required rate of return or cost of capital used to discount future cash flows.

businessContext_i18n.en: Required rate of return or cost of capital used to discount future cash flows.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Gelecekteki nakit akışlarını iskonto etmek için kullanılan gerekli getiri oranı veya sermaye maliyeti.

breakdown.label: Present Value of Benefits
breakdown.description: Sum of discounted annual benefits over the project life.

breakdown.label: Total Present Value of Costs
breakdown.description: Initial cost plus discounted annual operating costs.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
